steps.assistant_text: 64-bit-by-short divmod helper. Moved from kernel_000.c (which builds at -O2 -mips2) into kernel_056.c (-O1 -mips3) so IDO inlines ddivu (MIPS3 instruction). Body is the natural 'void f(u64*quot, u64*rem, u64 val, u16 d) { *quot = val/d; *rem = val%d; }' — at -O1 IDO does not CSE the two divisions, producing 2 sequential ddivu insns matching target.

metadata.verification: Verified byte-identical against expected/.o (cmp clean) after refreshing expected/ for the file-split move.
